job_description: We are looking for a React Developer with 2+ years of experience in React hooks, Redux, REST APIs, and responsive UI design. Experience with TypeScript is a plus.
Looking for a Node.js engineer with strong knowledge of Express or Fastify, MongoDB, REST API design, and JWT authentication.
Seeking a Machine Learning Engineer with expertise in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and model deployment using FastAPI or Flask.
Internship for frontend developer comfortable with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and basic React. Portfolio projects required.
Full stack developer needed with React on frontend and Node.js/Express on backend. Must know SQL and NoSQL databases.
Contract DevOps role requiring AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and Linux administration skills.
Part-time React Native developer to build cross-platform mobile apps. Must know React, Redux, and native device APIs.
Data analyst role requiring Python, SQL, Excel, Power BI or Tableau, and experience with large datasets.
